assertions.summary: Selecting the live agent row immediately showed the spawned scoop chat with the preexisting assistant message "Starting." and a bash tool card, and the same panel later updated with the final assistant summary after the bash command completed. When the row vanished quickly after switching away post-run, IndexedDB still showed the full persisted session history under session-agent-49fac82b3fd3.
assertions.reason: The chat panel was non-empty on click, displayed already-produced scoop history, updated in place as the run finished, and SessionStore persistence confirmed the full turn history after cleanup.

frictions: The scoop row disappeared quickly after the run completed and I switched back to the cone, so I used IndexedDB SessionStore evidence to confirm the full persisted history after cleanup.
agent-browser body-text capture on this page included sidebar CSS and xterm noise, so screenshots plus IndexedDB were the clearest evidence.
notes: No browser console errors were observed; VAL-SPAWN-016-console-errors.txt contains "none".
The persisted SessionStore entry was browser-coding-agent / sessions / session-agent-49fac82b3fd3 with three messages: Starting, the bash tool call, and the final assistant summary.
